offlineEvent.title: Freedom of Money Book Club Launch & Sharing Session
offlineEvent.launchHeadline: The global Freedom of Money book club sets sail
offlineEvent.launchTagline: Hong Kong premiere on 20 June — witness the first NFT member benefits and the global reader community
offlineEvent.subtitle: The Commercial Press · My Book One Club · IPDEX
offlineEvent.venue: The Commercial Press · Tsim Sha Tsui flagship store
offlineEvent.address:
Shop 25, G/F & Whole Floor, 1/F, Miramar Tower, 83–97 Nathan Road, Tsim Sha Tsui, Kowloon
(MTR Tsim Sha Tsui Station Exit A1, turn right)
flowParagraphs: A great book inspires thought; a strong reader community keeps ideas growing.

On 20 June, the global Freedom of Money book club launch ceremony will be held at The Commercial Press Tsim Sha Tsui flagship in Hong Kong, bringing together guests from publishing, technology, investment, and content creation to mark the club's official founding.

Freedom of Money records Changpeng Zhao (CZ)'s growth and entrepreneurial path and reflects how digital-era innovators think and act. The global book club will build an open, diverse platform for readers worldwide to discuss reading, entrepreneurship, innovation, and our times.

As a key innovation, the event will release exclusive digital member benefits. Attendees receive a Freedom of Money digital certificate issued by the book club (powered by IPDEX and DataDance) for membership proof and collectibility, with more activities and community perks to follow.

The programme includes keynote sharing, a roundtable, and open networking. Guests from the author team, industry, and leading voices will explore entrepreneurship, long-term thinking, content value, and cultural innovation in the digital age.
From one book to one community, from reading to co-creation — the global book club invites everyone who loves reading and innovation to connect ideas and create value through sharing.
Join us on 20 June at The Commercial Press Tsim Sha Tsui flagship to witness the launch of the global Freedom of Money book club.
offlineEvent.agendaTopic: Pages of history, paths to the future — Global Freedom of Money Book Club launch
offlineEvent.agendaVenue: The Commercial Press Tsim Sha Tsui flagship store

agendaRows.content: Welcome from The Commercial Press on the cultural significance of publishing Freedom of Money in Hong Kong.

agendaRows.segment: Keynote: Freedom of Money and the spirit of the age
agendaRows.content: Guests share insights on the book, entrepreneurship, and today's opportunities.
Industry guests discuss reading, innovation, community building, and digital-era trends.
A short film on the book's spirit and global community stories.
Official founding of the global book club and release of NFT member credentials and future benefits.
Guests and readers mingle and take photos together.

highlights: Official launch of the global Freedom of Money book club
First release of book-club NFT member benefits
The Commercial Press Hong Kong premiere event
Premiere of the Freedom of Money community film

book.title: About The Book
book.subtitle: The story of how a programmer changed the global cryptocurrency market
book.publisher: Published by Commercial Press Hong Kong
book.content1: Changpeng Zhao (CZ) is the founder of Binance, the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange. From an immigrant child working at McDonald's to becoming one of the most influential figures in the cryptocurrency industry, CZ's life journey is filled with challenges, innovation, and breakthroughs.
book.content2: In Freedom of Money, CZ shares for the first time his personal growth, entrepreneurial journey, and profound insights into the cryptocurrency industry. From his early experiences at Bloomberg and Tokyo Stock Exchange to creating Binance and making it an industry leader, CZ illustrates through personal experience what true 'entrepreneurial spirit' means.
book.content3: This book is not only an entrepreneurial history but also a life guide about perseverance, innovation, risk management, and long-term vision. Whether you're a cryptocurrency enthusiast, entrepreneur, or reader interested in technological innovation, you'll gain inspiration and strength from CZ's story.
book.content4: Beyond the arc told in these chapters, many readers also follow author appearances and book-related updates. Tours, talks, or signings—wherever they happen—are confirmed only through Commercial Press Hong Kong and CZ’s own official channels.
book.feature1Desc: CZ's first public sharing of entrepreneurial experience and business wisdom
book.feature2Desc: Cross-border experience from Asia to North America, from traditional finance to cryptocurrency
book.feature3Desc: How to make the right decisions under extreme market conditions
book.feature4Desc: How to build and manage a globalized innovative team
book.pickupStoresIntro: After purchasing the premium collector's edition, collect your physical copy at any store below. Bring your reservation voucher NFT or purchase confirmation, and check each store's opening hours.

book.authorBio1: Changpeng Zhao (CZ) is the founder and former CEO of Binance. Binance is the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange with daily trading volumes of tens of billions of dollars.
book.authorBio2: CZ grew up in Canada and worked at McDonald's and gas stations to help his family. He studied computer science at McGill University and after graduation worked at fintech companies in Tokyo and New York. In 2017, he founded Binance and built it into a global leading cryptocurrency trading platform in just a few months.
book.authorBio3: CZ has been named by Fortune magazine as one of the most influential business figures in the world and is one of the most respected leaders in the cryptocurrency industry. He is committed to promoting the popularization and development of blockchain technology and believes that cryptocurrency can provide financial freedom to billions of people worldwide.

club.storiesDisclaimer: Stories are sourced from public posts or editorial submissions; tone is filtered for a respectful book-site context. Rights remain with the original authors.

principles.title: CZ Principles
principles.subtitle: Eight core principles guiding the path from zero to global leader
principles.badgeNote: Exclusive badges will be launched for each principle
principles.principle1Desc: Not pursuing short-term gains, but focusing on building sustainable businesses and ecosystems.
principles.principle1Quote: We're not building a one-year business, we're building a business that can last for decades.
principles.principle2Desc: Making decisions and executing plans as quickly as possible while ensuring safety.
principles.principle2Quote: Opportunities are fleeting, fast action is more important than perfect planning.
principles.principle3Desc: Always put users' interests and safety first, this is the foundation of building trust.
principles.principle3Quote: Without users' trust, we have no future.
principles.principle4Desc: No matter how much you achieve, maintain a mindset of learning and growth.
principles.principle4Quote: We are always students, the market is the best teacher.
principles.principle5Desc: In a rapidly changing industry, adaptability is more important than sticking to tradition.
principles.principle5Quote: The only constant is change itself.
principles.principle6Desc: Maintain open and honest communication with the team, users, and community.
principles.principle6Quote: Transparency builds trust, trust creates value.
principles.principle7Desc: Use our success to help more people and promote industry and social progress.
principles.principle7Quote: The meaning of success is how many people you can help.
principles.principle8Desc: Never stop exploring new possibilities and driving continuous progress in technology and products.
principles.principle8Quote: Innovation is not a choice, it's a necessity for survival.
principles.shareDesc: What other essences from the book do you think are worth summarizing as principles? Or want to share certain topics?
principles.shareDesc2: Submit your ideas in the form below, and the book club will regularly select lucky users to participate in specific events.
principles.formDescPlaceholder: Please describe the principles you think are worth summarizing or topics you want to share...
principles.formEmailPlaceholder: If you would like us to contact you

timeline.title: CZ Timeline
timeline.subtitle: From Jiangsu to global crypto infrastructure — major milestones drawn from public interviews and reputable sources. Figures and rankings change over time.
timeline.carouselHint: Arrow keys or swipe · tap a card to focus · tap again for details.
timeline.carouselTapCentreExpand: Focus this card, then tap again to expand.
timeline.disclaimer: Thumbnails and links go to third-party YouTube pages; playback depends on the platform and uploader. This page is an editorial summary for readers of Freedom of Money — not legal or investment advice. Dates and statistics may vary slightly by source.
timeline.xFeedSubtitle: Editor-selected posts from @cz_binance (local snapshot; open on X for full context).
timeline.xFeedDisclaimer: Displayed text comes from a local snapshot — for the live thread and context, follow the link to X.
timeline.ytArchiveSubtitle: Interviews and talks. Each card opens YouTube (or YouTube Music for podcasts).
timeline.ytDisclaimer: Links go to YouTube. Availability depends on the platform and uploader.
timeline.pageNavAria: Jump to a section on this page
timeline.filterCuratorNote: Default view shows a curated selection of CZ & Binance–related posts. Open “Full archive” for every saved item.
timeline.xFeedFilterEmpty: No posts match the featured filter. Switch to the full archive or refresh after running the timeline curator script.
timeline.ytFilterEmpty: No videos match the featured filter in this snapshot. View the full archive to see every saved recording.
timeline.event1Desc: Changpeng “CZ” Zhao was born in Lianyungang; his parents were educators navigating China’s post‑Cultural Revolution years.
timeline.event1Detail1: Early years emphasized discipline, adaptation, and curiosity about how systems work.
timeline.event1Detail2: Would later describe himself as a builder-engineer before anything else.
timeline.event2Desc: At age 12 the family emigrated to Vancouver — a reset that shaped CZ’s work ethic and cross-cultural fluency.
timeline.event2Detail1: Took service jobs (fast food, gas station) to contribute at home.
timeline.event2Detail2: Learned English in immersion while keeping academic focus.
timeline.event2Detail3: McGill University in Montreal became the bridge into professional software.
timeline.event3Desc: Graduated with a CS foundation that mapped cleanly onto trading infrastructure later in life.
timeline.event3Detail1: Deep work in algorithms, data structures, and reliable systems.
timeline.event3Detail2: Built projects that mirrored real-world performance constraints.
timeline.event3Detail3: This training foreshadowed exchange matching engines and low-latency stacks.
timeline.event4Desc: Out of university: internship in Tokyo on order-matching for an exchange subcontractor, then roughly four years at Bloomberg Tradebook building futures software in New York.
timeline.event4Detail1: Learned how institutional order books, risk, and market microstructure behave in production.
timeline.event4Detail2: Experienced the rigor of global trading desks before crypto existed.
timeline.event4Detail3: Carried those patterns into every trading system he architected afterward.
timeline.event5Desc: In 2005 he moved to Shanghai and co-founded Fusion Systems, supplying some of the fastest automated trading stacks to brokerages.
timeline.event5Detail1: Focused on robust, low-latency pipelines and integration discipline.
timeline.event5Detail2: Worked at the intersection of traditional finance and cutting-edge automation.
timeline.event5Detail3: This decade anchored his credibility when crypto markets later demanded industrial-grade infrastructure.
timeline.event6Desc: 2013: introduced to Bitcoin over poker with industry peers; went deep on blockchain. Joined the Blockchain.info wallet team and became CTO at OKCoin.
timeline.event6Detail1: Converted conviction into hands-on protocol and wallet experience.
timeline.event6Detail2: Operational exposure to a top-tier Chinese exchange during a formative industry phase.
timeline.event6Detail3: Realized centralized exchanges could be built with startup speed if engineering culture was right.
timeline.event7Desc: Founded BijieTech to ship white-label exchange technology to regional venues — a direct rehearsal for assembling Binance’s launch crew.
timeline.event7Detail1: Productized exchange modules: matching, wallets, risk, and operations tooling.
timeline.event7Detail2: Validated go-to-market in several Asian markets.
timeline.event7Detail3: Brought senior engineers forward into the next chapter.
timeline.event8Desc: July 2017: Binance unveiled, raising on the order of fifteen million dollars via the BNB token sale before opening trading shortly thereafter.
timeline.event8Detail1: Focused on listings velocity, resilient architecture, and multilingual support.
timeline.event8Detail2: Prioritized liquidity and user experience when incumbents were still sluggish.
timeline.event8Detail3: Turned a bootstrapped team into a 24/7 operations culture.
timeline.event8Detail4: Set the tone: ship weekly, measure in basis points of uptime.
timeline.event9Desc: Within months of launch Binance climbed global spot-volume rankings — a growth curve rarely seen in fintech history.
timeline.event9Detail1: Daily volumes surged as retail and institutional users piled in.
timeline.event9Detail2: Spot product depth became the magnet; derivatives followed.
timeline.event9Detail3: Demonstrated that a mobile-era exchange could out-iterate legacy venues.
timeline.event10Desc: 2018–2019: announced regional hubs (notably Malta), expanded fiat ramps, and scaled compliance investments across entities as scrutiny intensified.
timeline.event10Detail1: Built partnerships with regulators and banks country-by-country.
timeline.event10Detail2: Launched localized gateways and market-maker programs.
timeline.event10Detail3: Invested heavily in KYC/AML tooling to keep pace with user growth.
timeline.event11Desc: 2019–2022: shipped proprietary ledgers, DEX experiments, Labs investments, and later smart-contract platforms that fed an ecosystem of thousands of projects.
timeline.event11Detail1: Released Binance Chain / DEX iterations that informed later BNB Chain strategy.
timeline.event11Detail2: Spun up venture and incubation arms for builders worldwide.
timeline.event11Detail3: User counts and product breadth reached levels comparable with top consumer internet platforms.
timeline.event12Desc: November 2023: Binance and U.S. agencies reached resolutions including a $4.3 billion corporate penalty package; Zhao stepped down as CEO while the company pled guilty to specific charges.
timeline.event12Detail1: Personal fine and plea terms accompanied the corporate settlements.
timeline.event12Detail2: Leadership passed to seasoned executives focused on licensing.
timeline.event12Detail3: Marked a hard pivot from hyper-growth narrative to supervised operations.
timeline.event13Desc: 2024: sentenced to four months, served the term, and completed federal custody by September 2024 per public BOP records.
timeline.event13Detail1: Maintained low public profile while focusing on family and health.
timeline.event13Detail2: Prepared long-form writing about lessons from the arc.
timeline.event14Desc: April 2026: launched Freedom of Money — the flagship biography tying together childhood, exchange wars, and regulatory reckoning; Chinese readers also received 《幣安人生》 in traditional script.
timeline.event14Detail1: Proceeds directed to charitable structures per publisher communications.
timeline.event14Detail2: Blends personal narrative with operator-level insight for builders.
timeline.event14Detail3: Serves as the capstone artifact for this book-site experience.

purchase.title: Buy book
purchase.termsNote: By logging in, you agree to IPDEX platform's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
purchase.ipdexPriceNote: Final price is determined at checkout on the IPDEX market.
purchase.stripePriceNote: Price is loaded from the primary-sale listing; checkout happens on Stripe.
purchase.stripeCheckoutHint: Click below to create your order and open Stripe in a new tab (same-tab redirect if pop-ups are blocked).
purchase.successMessage: You have successfully purchased {{quantity}} NFT badge(s)
purchase.viewAccountPrompt: NFT badge has been issued to your account
purchase.chainSettlementHint: Ledger: {{dex}} for trading · NFTs anchored on {{chain}}
purchase.ipdexCheckoutSubtitle: Estimated selection: {{quantity}} item(s). Indicative subtotal HK$ {{totalPrice}} — confirm quantity and pricing on IPDEX.
purchase.ddcSettlementLine: {{chain}} (chain id {{chainId}}): DDCNFT mint/settlement applies when this primary sale lists that chain and ERC-721.
purchase.partnerApiReminder: Partner API (verification / treasury) authenticates server-side via HMAC against {{partnerBase}} — never expose your app secret in this website; call it from your backend alongside IPDEX (see docs/partner in the ipdex-backend repo).
purchase.missingMarketConfig: Configure VITE_IPDEX_MARKET_URL and VITE_IPDEX_BOOK_PRIMARY_SALE_ID before opening IPDEX.
purchase.ipdexOpenedBody: Complete NFT checkout in the IPDEX tab. Trading runs on {{dex}}; on-chain NFTs for this ecosystem use {{chain}} ({{chainId}}) when minting is configured.
purchase.ipdexOpenedHint: Partner integrations (capital verification, transfer, snapshot) belong on your backend, not inside this SPA.
purchase.primaryPurchaseFailed: Could not create the order. Check BFF logs, BOOK_PRIMARY_LISTING_ID, and that you are logged in.
purchase.bffEmailIntro: Sign in with the email OTP flow (handled by the book-site BFF; no Partner secret in the browser).
purchase.bffCheckoutNote: Primary checkout is created through the BFF with your session cookie — Stripe opens when the API returns a payment URL.
purchase.bffOffline: Book-site BFF unreachable. Local dev: run npm run dev:with-bff, or in a second terminal npm run bff:dev (Vite proxies /api/bff to port 8787). Ensure bff/.env exists. Hosted test: this host must expose /api/bff to your BFF.
purchase.bffAuthError: Sign-in failed. Check the code and try again.
purchase.listingResolveFailed: Could not load listing uuid from Primary Sale detail. Check BFF /market/primary-sales and VITE_IPDEX_BOOK_PRIMARY_SALE_ID.
purchase.listingFallbackHint: No server listing id: open the IPDEX market page instead if configured.
purchase.successBffStripe: Order created. Complete payment on the Stripe page in the new tab.
purchase.successMarketFallback: Opened the IPDEX market page to finish checkout there.
purchase.stripeOpenedHint: After payment, your NFT is issued via {{dex}} and may anchor on {{chain}} when configured. Reopen Stripe below if the tab did not appear.
purchase.unpaidOrderBlocksCheckout: You have an unfinished pending order. Open your account and resolve it before buying again.
purchase.invalidPaymentUrl: The server returned an invalid payment link. Try again later or contact support.

primarySaleUnavailable.soldOut:
This Primary Sale is sold out on IPDEX (listing shows SOLD_OUT). The market site may say the event "ended".

Ask operations to add inventory or create a new sale, then update VITE_IPDEX_BOOK_PRIMARY_SALE_ID and VITE_IPDEX_BOOK_PRIMARY_LISTING_ID (and BFF BOOK_PRIMARY_LISTING_ID), then redeploy.
primarySaleUnavailable.expired: This Primary Sale has expired on IPDEX. Configure a new sale or extend the window in Admin.
primarySaleUnavailable.delisted: This Primary Sale has been delisted on IPDEX. Relist it or point the book site at an active sale UUID.
primarySaleUnavailable.notStarted: This Primary Sale has not started yet on IPDEX. Wait for the start time or update the configuration.

purchaseSuccess.documentTitle: Payment received · Freedom of Money Book Club
purchaseSuccess.title: Payment received
purchaseSuccess.body: Thank you. Stripe has recorded your payment. Your CZ Life NFT may take a short moment to appear in your account while IPDEX settles the order.

account.loginSubtitle: Sign in with the same email OTP as IPDEX — first-time visitors get an IPDEX account automatically. Account, NFT, and order data are powered by IPDEX.
account.web3authError: Wallet sign-in failed. Try again or use email OTP.
account.bindEmailSubtitle: Web3Auth did not provide an email. Verify one with OTP to secure purchases and notifications.
account.bindEmailSuccess: Email linked to your wallet account.
account.bindEmailError: Could not bind email. Check the code or try another address.
account.giftSubtitle: Transfer this NFT to another member by email. They must have or create an IPDEX account.
account.giftError: Could not complete the gift. Check the recipient email and try again.
account.title: Account
account.syncingAfterPurchase: Payment received. We're confirming your vouchers, order, and on-chain records. This may take up to a minute—please wait and don't refresh the page.
account.noNfts: No NFT balances returned for this page yet.
account.secondaryHint: Paste a listing UUID from IPDEX, then create checkout via BFF.
account.secondarySuccess: Secondary order created. Complete payment if a URL is shown.
account.secondaryError: Could not create the secondary order.
account.eventConfirmBody: We recorded your interest. Final schedules are posted in @czlifeclub.
account.redeemSuccess: Redeemed successfully. Your attendance NFT should appear shortly after refresh.
account.redeemScanLoginHint: After you sign in, on-site redeem will open automatically. Use the email from your premium purchase.
account.redeemScanNoneBody: Your account has no premium reservation voucher eligible for on-site redeem. Purchase the premium collector's edition first, then scan again at the venue.
account.stubAttendanceExplanation: This is your commemorative attendance stub after venue redemption — it cannot be exchanged again at the booth.
account.redeemModalBody: This transfers your voucher NFT into the venue redemption vault on-chain (DDCNFT has no literal burn opcode) and mints a commemorative attendance NFT under an operations-configured stub collection. Staff must authorize with the venue code.
account.redeemModalBodyStaff: Venue staff: enter the redemption code from operations on this phone. Confirm the attendee has selected the voucher NFT shown below.
account.redeemProcessingBody: On-chain verification can take up to a minute. Please stay on this page and wait — do not close or navigate away.
account.redeemErrorNotEligible: This NFT cannot be redeemed (wrong collection or not available).
account.redeemErrorBalanceLock: The server could not lock this NFT (−10603). Typical causes in IPDEX Client: no `t_nft_balances` row matching your logged-in uid + series UUID + token id, `locked_balance` > 0, or token id mismatched versus the database.
account.redeemErrorSourceSeries: Your series UUID is not allowed by the redemption rule (−10602). Confirm the UUID on screen appears in Admin → NFT redemption rules for the rule wired by `VITE_IPDEX_NFT_REDEMPTION_RULE_ID`.
account.redeemErrorUpstreamTips: Hard-refresh SPA (⌘⇧R). Set localStorage.bookDebugRedeem="1" — the error shows `[#code] …`; `(empty upstream message)` means upstream omitted text.
account.redeemErrorNoStock: Attendance stubs are sold out server-side — ask operations to restock ACTIVE primary listing tokens.
account.redeemErrorChain: On-chain redemption failed. Retry or contact support.
account.redeemErrorRuleRequired: This environment needs a redemption configuration id. Ask operations or set VITE_IPDEX_NFT_REDEMPTION_RULE_ID.
account.premiumVoucherNote: Premium tier — redeem on-site at the event for an attendance stub.
account.standardMemberNote: Commemorative badge only — no on-site redemption.
account.redeemStaffAssistHint: Pass the phone to staff to type the code, then tap Verify & redeem.
account.redeemPageIntro: Choose the voucher to exchange for the attendance stub. Then staff enters the redemption code.
account.redeemNoEligibleNfts: There are no voucher NFTs in this account eligible for redemption, or holdings have not synced yet.
